name: HRC_ATOMPUB_ENTRIES
description:
Represents  entries, acting as a container for metadata and data associated with an entry.  An element can appear as a child of the atom:feed element, or it can 
appear as the document (i.e., top-level) element of a stand-alone Atom Entry Document.

columns.Name: ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an atom entry  row.

columns.Name: COLLECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRC_ATOMPUB_COLLECTIONS.COLLECTION_ID

columns.Name: ATOM_ID
columns.Comments: The ATOM Entry UUID which is a GUID

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: Specifies the <title> tag value containing Human readable title for the entry

columns.Name: UPDATED
columns.Comments: Updated entry timestamp. Can be set to a future time.

columns.Name: ARCHIVED
columns.Comments: Entry archived timestamp

columns.Name: PURGED
columns.Comments: Entry purged timestamp

columns.Name: SECURITY_ID
columns.Comments: The security identifier which is a fusion surrogate key value based on the HRC_ATOMPUB_COLLECTIONS.SECURITY_TYPE value

columns.Name: SOURCE_ENTRY_ID
columns.Comments:
Identifies a source atom entry. Foreign Key to HRC_ATOM_ENTRIES.ENTRY_ID

If an atom:entry is copied from one feed into another feed then SOURCE_ENTRY_ID points to the original entry.

columns.Name: ENTRY_XML
columns.Comments: XML Fragment for Entry. Containing root node is <entry>

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Reference ID for atompub entries

indexes.Columns: COLLECTION_ID, UPDATED, ENTRY_ID, ARCHIVED, PURGED, REFERENCE_ID
COLLECTION_ID, CREATION_DATE, ENTRY_ID, ARCHIVED, PURGED, REFERENCE_ID
